gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/70)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/70)
text: مَا صَافَحَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) رَجُلًا قَطُّ فَنَزَعَ يَدَهُ حَتَّى يَكُونَ هُوَ الَّذِي يَنْزِعُ يَدَهُ مِنْهُ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ismail Bin Mihran, from Ayman Bin Muhriz,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>azwj</sup> did not shake the hand of a man at all and removed his<sup>saww</sup> hand away until he was the one who removed his hand from his<sup>saww</sup> (first)’.
en.sarwar: 15. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Isma’il ibn Mehran from Ayman ibn Muhriz from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “When shaking hands with people, the Messenger of Allah had never been the first to discontinue the handshake.”
